subject: Two faerie figures with translucent wings posing in a misty atmosphere, the foreground one bearing a small blade with a sly grin
description: Two slim faeries with iridescent wings and pale skin pose mid-air. The forward figure leans toward the viewer with a sly, knowing expression and a small dagger raised; the second figure hovers just behind in a more casual stance. Ornamental fae clothing of leaves and feathers; messy hair tossed by unseen wind. The palette is pale blues and lavender against a misty out-of-focus background. The vibe is mischievous, courtly-but-dangerous — flavor text reads they 'function as everything from assassins to jesters in the name of their fae king.'
foreground: Two winged faeries with mischievous expressions, foreground figure raising a small dagger
